description: Register a GongResource wrapping Gong API v2 Basic Auth credentials for use by other components

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource. Other components reference it via resource_key.

access_key_env_var.label: Access Key Env Var
access_key_env_var.description: Env var holding the Gong API access key

access_key_secret_env_var.label: Access Key Secret Env Var
access_key_secret_env_var.description: Env var holding the Gong API access key secret

base_url.label: Base URL
base_url.description: Gong API base URL. Override for regional endpoints (EU/APAC).

name: Gong Resource
